description:
## Component: hx-checkbox (UPGRADE)
**Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 6/6 libraries**

Upgrade existing scaffold to production-grade checkbox with indeterminate state and Drupal Form API integration.

### ADR-001 Classification: Hybrid (Form Component)
Properties control checked/indeterminate state. Default slot accepts label text from Drupal.

### API Design

**Properties:**
- `name`, `value`, `checked`, `indeterminate`, `required`, `disabled`
- `label`: string (alternative to slot)
- `error`: string
- `hx-size`: sm | md | lg

**Slots:**
- Default slot: Label text (rich HTML allowed — Drupal can include links in consent labels)
- `help`: Help text
- `error`: Error message

**CSS Parts:** `checkbox`, `label`, `control`, `help-text`, `error-message`

**Events:** `hx-change` (composed: true, detail: { checked, value })

### Drupal Integration
```twig
{# Consent checkbox with rich HTML label (slot-driven) #}
<hx-checkbox name="consent" required>
  I consent to treatment and acknowledge the
  <hx-link href="/privacy-policy">privacy policy</hx-link>.
</hx-checkbox>

{# Simple boolean checkbox #}
<hx-checkbox name="hipaa_acknowledged" required label="I acknowledge HIPAA requirements"></hx-checkbox>
```

The label slot is critical for Drupal — consent forms need links and rich HTML in checkbox labels, which is impossible with a property-only approach.

### ElementInternals: Full form participation (value submitted when checked)

### Healthcare Use Cases
- HIPAA consent acknowledgment
- Treatment consent with linked privacy policy
- Feature toggles in admin settings
- Patient condition checklists

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Three visual states: unchecked, checked, indeterminate
2. Default slot accepts rich HTML labels (links, bold, etc.)
3. ElementInternals form participation (only submits value when checked)
4. Keyboard: Space toggles, focus ring visible
5. Click on label toggles checkbox
6. WCAG 2.1 AA: proper ARIA roles, state announcements
title: T1-09: hx-checkbox — Boolean Selection
